title: Manage Organizations
description: List organizations you have access to and retrieve organization details.

steps.title: List your organizations
steps.description: Get all organizations accessible with your credentials. This is often the first query after authentication.
steps.tip: The 'id' field is your organization ID - use it in the Key header for all subsequent requests.

steps.title: Get organization details
steps.description: Fetch detailed information about a specific organization including its campaign orders.

steps.title: Use the organization ID
steps.description: Include the organization ID in all subsequent requests using the 'Key' header.
steps.tip: Most queries and mutations require the Key header to be set to your organization ID.

tips: Your organization ID goes in the 'Key' request header
level indicates your partnership tier (e.g., PARTNER, AGENCY)
You can access multiple organizations with the same credentials
Use orgs(first: N) to paginate through organizations
